text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Disaster Loans 3 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Agricultural Issues Business Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BUSINESS OREGON SMALL BUSINESS NAVIGATOR HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and resource referral for businesses in Oregon regarding wildfires and other emergencies. Includes information on financial assistance programs and reopening guidance. 775 Summer Street NE Suite 200 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Business owners and employers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (833) 604-0880 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE RURAL DEVELOPMENT OREGON STATE EMERGENCY FARM LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency loans to restore or replace essential property and living expenses, cover production costs, reorganize operations, or refinance certain debts when a natural disaster is declared by the Secretary of Agriculture or by the President under the Stafford Act. 1220 SW 3rd Avenue Suite 1801 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Varies Hours: Not applicable Email (503) 414-3300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES SMALL BUSINESS ADMINISTRATION ECONOMIC INJURY DISASTER LOAN PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Funding to cover small business operating expenses after a declared disaster. Eligibility: Must be located in a federally declared disaster area Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 659-2955 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES SMALL BUSINESS ADMINISTRATION BUSINESS PHYSICAL DISASTER LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides loans of up to $2,000,000 to qualified business or nonprofit organizations. Loan proceeds may be used for repair or replacement of physical property, machinery, inventory, or improvements to the business site. This program covers losses not fully covered by insurance. Eligibility: Must be located in a federally declared disaster area Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 659-2955 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES SMALL BUSINESS ADMINISTRATION HOME AND PERSONAL PROPERTY LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Loans to cover repairs and replacement of physical assets damaged in a declared disaster. Homeowners may apply for up to $500,000 to replace or repair their primary residence. Renters and homeowners may borrow up to $100,000 to replace or repair personal property — such as clothing, furniture, cars, and appliances — damaged or destroyed in a disaster. Eligibility: Must be located in federally declared disaster area. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 659-2955 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BUSINESS OREGON SMALL BUSINESS NAVIGATOR HOTLINE UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE EMERGENCY FARM LOANS
